prestazioni: Engine swap to a 6VD1 3.2L V6 with forged internals (JE Pistons 9.5:1 CR, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings) and a custom Irmscher-spec camshaft grind (272° duration, 0.480" lift) paired with a GReddy T518Z turbocharger (1.06 A/R turbine housing) running 18 psi on a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with flex-fuel ethanol mapping

Full Irmscher Motorsport-developed drivetrain reinforcement: Quaife ATB differential (84.5mm gear set) in the rear, custom 3.90:1 ring & pinion gears (Richmond Gear), and a Tilton twin-disc clutch (7.25" organic/metallic hybrid) with a billet flywheel (Spec Stage 3+)

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 10kg/mm front/12kg/mm rear springs), Irmscher Motorsport-specific sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 62mm front control arm bushings, spherical bearing rear subframe mounts)
estetica: Full Irmscher Motorsport U1200R widebody conversion kit (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber front splitter, and rear diffuser) with custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap and Irmscher Motorsport decals (1989-spec "Irmscher V6" side stripes)
BBS RS-GT II 17x9" wheels (ET20, 5x139.7 PCD) with Nankang AR-1 semi-slick tires (255/40R17 front, 275/40R17 rear) and custom Irmscher-branded center caps

Interior retrofit with Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (Irmscher Motorsport embroidered headrests), MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (380mm, suede), and a custom roll cage (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly, 6-point with harness bar) painted in Irmscher Motorsport Anthracite Gray (RAL 7016)
